privacidade.intro: This privacy policy was created to show to our users the transparency of Gartic's conduct in relation to the few data requested from users in the game environment. In the paragraphs below, we list some important information that will assure the tranquility of the interested parties, guaranteeing the clear purpose of the site.
privacidade.impText01: Protecting the information of our users is one of the main ways to ensure trust, loyalty, and satisfaction. For us, nothing can be more important than developing a responsible relationship with the data that is sent by our users.
privacidade.impText02: Access to this data is restricted to a few administrators in charge. This procedure ensures the confidentiality and care of the information.
privacidade.infText01: With the exclusive purpose of providing quality and safety fun for those who want to have fun with our game, we offer the option to create an individual registration, so that you can register your information related to your own achievements and drawings in the Environment of the game.
privacidade.infText02: To do this, we ask for certain personal information, such as the e-mail address, and to create a password. Such information may be used occasionally to send messages and announcements relating to events, news and promotions, with the sole purpose of providing a better gaming experience and making ourselves available to remedy your possible user doubts. In case the user does not want to continue receiving our e-mail messages, you can choose to stop receiving them by following the instructions included in each newsletter.
privacidade.CompText01: The Gartic team commits to its users to fulfill the following purposes:
privacidade.CompText02: Do not post, disclose or reveal photos submitted by our users without prior authorization and consent.
privacidade.CompText03: The personal data of each participant is stored safely in our environment and will not be provided, shared or sold to any requesting entity.
privacidade.CompText04: We are committed to using browser cookies solely for internal game and access controls.
privacidade.CompText05: Do not divulge the e-mail address of our registered users without the authorization and knowledge of them.
privacidade.CompText06: Don't use other user's drawings without showing the author's credits.
privacidade.CompText07: Users can contact us by email below:

regras.tx1: Read carefully the following rules. They describes what the players can and can not do. A player who disrespects any of the rules will receive punishment without previous warnings, provided there is evidence for the offender's act. The punishments applied are described in the punishment table.
regras.tx2: We emphasize that the most important is the mutual respect between players, honesty and the awareness that knowledge and compliance will contribute to a healthy and peaceful environment so that everyone can enjoy the moment and have fun. The allegation of ignorance of the rules does not minimize or exclude any penalty imposed.
regras.regrasTx01: It is prohibited to use any letters, or set of letters in the drawing.
regras.regrasTx02: The examples above are not a way of indicating how the drawing should be done, but rather a way of showing that it is possible to describe sounds, dialogues and draw any word without the using letters.
regras.regrasTx03: See the penalties for violating this rule.
regras.regrasTx04: Roman numerals (I, II, IV, V, etc ...) or Arabic numerals (1, 2, 10, 25, etc ...) are not allowed in the drawing, even if the numbers are not related to the word.
regras.regrasTx05: It is not allowed to use symbols of masculine and feminine, musical notes, dot (?,, Etc), accentuations or the symbols: $ @ & #. The use of arrows, or shapes as circles, to highlight some part of a drawing is allowed, as long as it does not affect the partial or total visualization of the drawing. The use of lines to denote something in the drawing is allowed.
regras.regrasTx06: Using any characters to form expressions such as "* - *", "=", "¬¬", "<<<<", "<----", etc., are not allowed before the drawing is complete . The player who is in charge to draw should always start drawing the requested word immediately.
regras.regrasTx07: Using any characters to form expressions such as "* - *", "=", "¬¬ ", "<<<<", "<----", etc., are not allowed before the drawing is complete . The player who is in charge to draw should always start drawing the requested word immediately.
regras.regrasTx08: The only exception to rules 1, 2, 3 and 4 is the use of letters, numbers, characters or symbols for the signing the own nickname or to dedicate to the nickname of other players that is also playing in the room, once the nick and / or dedication Do not reveal the current game answer, part of it or any kind of tip to find the answer. There will be no exception for user names, nicknames not present in the game, nicknames or any word other than the nickname itself. Therefore, only the nicknames of those present at the match should be used without any phrases before or after it.
regras.regrasTx09: In addition, to sign a drawing or dedicate it can only be made after the end of the drawing, so that they are not part of the design in whole or in part. The drawing also can not be erased to make the signature or dedication.
regras.regrasTx10: See punishments for signatures or dedications that hinder the visualization of the drawing.
regras.regrasTx11: See penalties for signatures or dedications that gives tips about the answers for the current draw.
regras.regrasTx12: It is forbidden to indicate in the drawing the number of letters, whether using traces, points or any way in this purpose.
regras.regrasTx13: If the player that is in charge to draw wishes to reveal some letters of the answer to help other players, should click on the hint button that will reveal some letters of the word, remembering that it is only possible to activate this option when no one has already hit the answer.
regras.regrasTx14: It is forbidden to draw anything that does not correspond with the word that has been drawn. If the player that is in charge to draw, considers the word difficult, can use the tips by clicking the tip button to help him or skip the turn, being warned that once writes something in the drawing, or if use symbols or characters and then jump Will also result in suspension.
regras.regrasTx15: If the player wishes to comment on the word that was drawn, he should use the chat, only doing this after the drawing is finished, and the comment can not help to discover the word.
regras.regrasTx16: Although drawing correctly, the user should not later compromise the visualization of his design, so that he can no longer identify the corresponding word.
regras.regrasTx17: For players who like to make puzzles, which are drawings that represent different forms of what was requested but with the same meaning, care must be taken that the drawing does not stop being corresponding with the word. Drawings that require prior knowledge not associated with the room may be punished.
regras.regrasTx18: It is not allowed to make drawings that show, in any language, words, symbols, gestures or offensive symbols.
regras.regrasTx19: It is also forbidden to make a drawing that relates the current answer world to any player in an offensive manner. These drawings will be considered offensive and the creator suspended.
regras.regrasTx20: It is not permitted to make drawings that relates to the current answer  to any player in a way that causes any embarrassment, turmoil, or even in a way that represents a threat, intimidation or provocation to the player or his or her family members. These drawings will be considered as tumult and the creator suspended.
regras.regrasTx21: It is not allowed to make drawings that show, in any language, words, gestures, symbols, or any content that contains discrimination, being social, religious, racial, sexual, political, sports, age, origin, nationality, Color, illness, marital status, family situation or by any characteristic that excludes the person socially or causes embarrassment to it.
regras.regrasTx22: It is also prohibited to make a drawing that relates the current answer to any player in a discriminatory manner. These drawings will be considered as discriminatory and the creator suspended.
regras.regrasTx23: It is not allowed to make drawings that show, in any language, words, acronyms, gestures or symbols that can be considered as slang. These drawings will be considered as improper and the creator suspended.
regras.regrasTx24: Drawings containing pornography and / or pedophilia are not allowed.
regras.regrasTx25: It is not allowed to make drawings that apologize to drugs, Nazism, terrorism, pedophilia, or any type of crimes that are contrary to Brazilian criminal legislation, updated at any time. If letters, acronyms, or words are used in violation of this rule, in any language, punishment will also occur in the same way. These drawings will be considered as apologists for crime and the creator suspended.
regras.regrasTx26: In all previous rules, even if the player draws, then erases it, scratches or attempts to conceal in any way what has been drawn, it does not minimize or exclude the level of the infraction, and should be suspended.
regras.regrasTx27: Any drawing that is saved on the game wall or on the free wall that violates the above rules will be deleted without prior notice and the player will receive the corresponding suspension of the infraction committed. Drawings with writing or numbers prior to the date of publication of this rule will only be deleted.
regras.regrasTx28: or free-wall drawings, only rules 8, 9, 10, 11, 12, 13 and 14 apply.
regras.regrasTx29: A player may only report a drawing if it violates any of the previous rules. To do this just click on the "Report Drawing" button. This complaint does not entail automatic suspension of the designer, only the cancellation of the drawing of the time and loss of all the points marked in the round.
regras.regrasTx30: Players can not report a drawing that is within the rules. If a player repeats this act more than once in the same match or in separate matches, he shall be suspended.
regras.regrasTx31: It's possible to use lines when the player wants to represent a negation
regras.reGerais01: Players can not pass the answer, or part of it, by chat. They should not also send synonyms, popular phrases, color or shape suggestions for drawings, corrections of drawings, puns, advertisements or music, or any other type of help to find the answer.
regras.reGerais02: If the player sends letters, texts or words in the answer field so that they indicate the word of the time to other players instead of guessing, it will also be considered an infraction.
regras.reGerais03: The player can comment in the chat about something he saw in the reply part or copy a word exactly the way it was written indicating the nick of the player who wrote it. The comment made in the chat can not indicate the word of the time or contain any kind of help, for example, say the word that is close to the answer, which is similar to it or different, etc ...
regras.reGerais04: For this rule there are two punishments: one for sending tips and other for sending a word of a part of it..
regras.reGerais05: It is not allowed to pass the answer of the design through any means of communication outside or inside the site. The player must always guess the word through a drawing within the rules.
regras.reGerais06: By virtue of this rule, in addition to the specific punishment, the user will be excluded from the rank, passing the victory of the day to the second player who acquired the most points, and will lose twice the points and victories obtained in the day.
regras.reGerais07: It is not allowed to play with more than one account in the same room in order to favor and / or earn points and victories more quickly, to leave room rank activated or any other purpose that is considered dishonest.
regras.reGerais08: By virtue of this rule, in addition to the specific punishment, the user will be excluded from the rank, passing the victory of the day to the second player who has acquired the most points, and will lose twice the points and victories obtained in the day.
regras.reGerais09: t is not allowed to deliberately delay the progress of the game. If a player's goal of delaying the match is proven, he will be suspended for this.
regras.reGerais10: Examples of behavior that delay the game: Keep sending words or characters just so as not to leave the room inactivity, talk in the answer area, incorrectly enter the answer in a deliberate way so that you are just getting the message from you are close, just chatting Without participation in the game, among other cases.
regras.reGerais11: In order for this rule to be suspended, a good number of proofs and the follow-up of a moderator in the situation is required, as it should be very clear that the person is acting in bad faith rather than simply ignoring the words..
regras.regrasCont: RULES FOR SCRAPBOOK, CHAT AND ANSWER BOX AT THE GAME
regras.regCont01: It is not allowed to spam the scrapbook, the game chat, or the game response field. We consider spam as advertisements and also the successive sending of texts (from 8 lines), containing letters, characters or words in a way that hinders other players from reading the content of the chat and the response field.
regras.regCont02: If a player is submitting an answer to the chat, other players should not spam to prevent others from seeing the response. The correct procedure is to send a complaint so that the offender receives suspension for his act.
regras.regCont04: See punishments for spam In the scrapbook.
regras.regCont05: It is not allowed to send words, symbols, characters, acronyms or texts with offensive content on the messages, chat part of the game or the part of the answers, whether this offense is directed at any player or his / her family.
regras.regCont06: The punishment will occur even if the offended player is not present, or the offense occurs on a scrapbook other than the scrapbook.
regras.regCont07: We emphasize that it is not necessary to use the nick of a player to characterize itself as an offense to it. If the use of actions / indirect terms to refer to a particular person during an offense is proven, there will also be suspension of offenders.
regras.regCont08: It is not allowed to send words, symbols, characters or texts with inappropriate or pornographic content on the messages, the chat part of the game or the part of the answers.
regras.regCont09: It is not allowed to send messages, words, symbols, characters, texts or acronyms that contain any kind of discrimination, be it social, religious, racial, sexual, political, sports, By age, by origin, by nationality, by color, by illness, by marital status, by family situation or by any characteristic that excludes the person socially or causes embarrassment.
regras.regCont10: It is not allowed to send words, symbols, characters or texts with inappropriate or pornographic content on the messages, the chat part of the game or the part of the answers.
regras.regCont11: It is not allowed to send in the chat part of the game or in the part of answers, words, symbols, characters, texts or any term that relate the current answer to any player or their relatives, in an offensive, discriminatory, provocative, Or turmoil. The infraction is characterized even if the player is not present in the room.
regras.regCont12: The punishment for this rule will depend on the kind of the violation. If it is offensive, there will be punishment for offense, if it is discriminatory, will be applied punishment for discrimination, in other cases, there will be applied punishment for turmoik.
regras.regCont13: It is not allowed to send in the messages, chat part of the game or the part of answers, words considered as low slang.
regras.regCont14: It is not allowed to send images, videos or any content that is offensive, discriminatory, inappropriate, low slang or in violation of any other rule. The punishment of this rule will correspond to that of the violated rule.
regras.regCont15: The argument that a content that violates rules 23, 24, 25, 26, 27, 28, and 29 is just a joke, an outburst or not directed at any user will not be accepted to prevent or minimize the suspension of the players involved.
regras.regCont16: Also, replacing some of the content with characters such as "*", "-", "_", or replacing letters with numbers does not make suspension application unviable. Content will be punished in any language that violates the above rules.
regras.regCont17: Any content that violates the above rules will be deleted without notice.
regras.contPerf01: In no part of the player's profile, such as name, photo or phrase, the user may place any content that is offensive, discriminatory, pornographic, inappropriate, low slang, provocative, that generates turmoil or that advocates drugs, terrorism, Nazism, pedophilia, or any type of crime that is contrary to Brazilian civil and criminal law, updated at any time. This rule applies to terms used in any language.
regras.contPerf02: Any content that violates this rule will be erased from the offender's profile without prior notice and it will be punished.
regras.contPerf03: Check punishments for offensive content in the profile.
regras.contPerf04: Check punishments for discriminatory content in the profile.
regras.contPerf05: Check punishments for low slang content in the profile.
regras.contPerf06: Check punishments for pornographic content in the profile.
regras.contPerf07: Check punishments for content that causes turmoil in the profile.
regras.contPerf08: It generates a definitive exclusion of the user's account, and without prior notice, from those who create a nickname that may be considered inappropriate for the site, that is offensive, discriminatory, provocative, pornographic, contrary to criminal and civil legislation, updated at any time (Eg: apology to crime, drugs, Nazism, pedophilia, terrorism etc). This rule applies to terms used in any language, not just in English.
regras.contPerf09: It is forbidden to create a profile with the purpose of pretending to be another player, or relatives of the same, in photo or nickname. Nicknames made to tease or offend any player on the site are also prohibited, as well as nicks that could cause turmoil on the site. Any account with this content will be permanently deleted without prior notice.
regras.contPerf10: Unauthorized reproduction of photos or drawings originally created by other users in your own profile is also prohibited. Any content that violates this rule will be deleted without notice at the request of the owner and the infringer will be punished.
regras.contPerf11: This rule also applies, as applicable, to the user who uses a line break or similar to pass through another player present in the room during the match.
regras.RestSite01: It is not allowed to make a mess in the site, or in scrap pages, with any type of content in the profile, with messages in the game chat, response field, drawings or any mural.
regras.RestSite02: It is considered as turmoil any action that has the purpose of provoking other players, intimidate or embarrass, expel from the room without reason, make false accusations, threaten, initiate or incite a discussion, bother clearly to other users, or with successive sending Lyrics, jokes, sung or any kind of content for this purpose.
regras.RestSite03: A riot can be carried out by one or several players, and does not necessarily have to use slang words or offenses.
regras.RestSite05: View punishments riot on scrapbook pages.
regras.RestSite06: It is not allowed at any time to pretend to be an administrator or owner of the site, nor to say that has the power to ban players, to expel from the room, to erase content from the profile or to do any type of action that is solely for the administration of the site. Making threats such as stating that the player will be suspended for certain action is also prohibited.
regras.RestSite07: It is not allowed to use the answer field to send inappropriate, low slang, discriminatory, pornographic or offensive words or texts.
regras.RestSite08: It is not allowed to create secondary accounts (fakes) with the purpose to tumble, to offend, to tease, to disrupt the game or to violate any rule of this site. If the link between a secondary account and the original profile of the player is proven, there will be exclusion for fake and the original profile will be suspended or deleted based on fake infractions.
regras.RestSite09: It is forbidden to share an account in order to get score or wins in a faster way in the game.
regras.RestSite10: By virtue of this rule, in addition to the specific punishment, the user will be excluded from the rank, passing the victory of the day to the second player who has acquired the most points, and will lose twice the points and victories obtained in the day.
regras.RestSite11: Check punishment for users who shares accounts.
regras.RestSite12: O jogador também receberá suspensão se fizer qualquer tipo de ofensa, provocação, discriminação ou tumulto, seja em desenhos, sala de jogo ou no conteúdo de um perfil que tenha como alvo membros da equipe Gartic. A punição ocorrerá para termos que violem estas regras em qualquer idioma.
regras.RestSite13: O tempo de punição será correspondente a regra violada.
regras.RestSite14: Links used anywhere on this site may not point to a page whose content causes disruption on the site or is considered to be offensive, discriminatory, pornographic or inappropriate.
regras.RestSite15: Punishment may also apply to the original user who used the shared account.
regras.criarSala01: It is not allowed to create rooms with an inappropriate name, offensive, discriminatory, provocative, pornographic, containing a word of low slang, apology to crime, drugs, terrorism, pedophilia, Nazism, or contrary to criminal and civil legislation. The terms forbidden in this rule apply to all languages. Rooms that violate this rule will be deleted and the player suspended. Users who participate in rooms with an improper name will also receive punishment.
regras.criarSala02: In created rooms, referred to in item 41, the room theme are not allowed to contain offensive, discriminatory, provocative, pornographic, low slang words that apologize to crime, drugs, pedophilia, terrorism, Nazism, or Anything that is contrary to the law. The terms forbidden in this rule apply to all languages. Themes whose use of words violate this rule will be deleted and the player suspended.
regras.diversos01: It is forbidden to report players or drawings in the room or on the site that are in its reason, expressly, violation of the rules of this game, among which can be cited as example offense, slang, discrimination, spam etc.
regras.diversos02: Any action that is considered dishonest, unfair or causing any kind of trouble to the site, any player or member of the Gartic team that is not detailed in the above rules will be reviewed by the team. If necessary, there will be punishment and explanations of the act will be presented to the player punished. The missing cases will be solved exclusively by the Gartic Team, and can be inserted in the rules, a posteriori, after verifying the recurrence of the cases.
regras.diversos03: For created rooms, the player responsible for creating the room may remove any player, even if he / she has not violated any rules of the site
regras.regrasJG01: If the the players tho in charge to draw commits an infraction, players in the room can report it by clicking on the "Report Drawing" button..
regras.regrasJG02: When half the players in the room report the designer, the round will be canceled. That is, the designer will lose the turn, and the players will lose the points they won in that round.
regras.regrasJG03: The designer has a few seconds to start drawing, otherwise he will lose the turn.
regras.regrasJG04: Each round starts with 10 points to be achieved, the first player to hit will win the ten points, the second will win nine, and so on until each player who hits them wins a point.
regras.regrasJG05: The player who is in charge to draw, will earn one more points than the first player to hit the drawing, plus two points for each player who hits the drawing.
regras.regrasJG06: Each tip given by the player who is in charge to draw decreases the value of the spin at one point. So if he gives two tips, the first player to hit will only win 8 points, just like the player who was drawing.
regras.regrasJG07: The maximum number of tips the designer can give depends on the size of the word. The bigger the word, the more tips it can give.
regras.regrasJG08: The first tip will always reveal the number of letters of the word. The second tip will always reveal the first letter of the word, the other tips will reveal a letter of the word randomly.
regras.regrasJG09: After a player hits the drawing, he will not be allowed to tip or jump.
regras.regrasJG10: Information such as duration of each round and number of points to achieve victory in the game, can be found in the description of each room.
regras.regrasJG11: Points and victories will be charged when there are at least five people in the room.

seguranca.subTitulo: Fun does not mix with worry. So we have created mechanisms to guarantee the security of the game environment. Below you will learn and learn how to activate this feature.
seguranca.txt01: The chat becomes inaccessible, so the user is safe from the risk of reading any messages from other players.
seguranca.txt02: The Player will be able to acess only the standard rooms, where traditionally users are more committed to the game than with the interaction tools.
